repository.fork_warning: A second Vercel project 'asce3nd-interactive-document' (with extra 'e') exists and is DEPRECATED. All future deploys go to the no-'e' canonical project.
repository.stray_file_note: A 0-byte file named 'nul' exists at repo root (Windows reserved name). Left untouched — not part of any phase. Verify before any Windows-hosted deploy.

chapter_1_preservation.verification_required_before_any_merge: byte-for-byte equality of ch1 steps after ch2 edits

known_bugs_at_baseline: Founder gender pronouns are REVERSED: code uses he/his for Otha and her/she for Elisha. Truth per Anton brief + Jeremy: Otha=female, Elisha=male.
rCh2Eventday hardcodes 'Target capacity: 40' and 'Total supply: 100' as string literals, ignoring state.chapter2.capacity and state.chapter2.supplies.
RSVP table writes directly to state.chapter2.rsvpSummary.rsvps -> localStorage -> Supabase. No source-of-truth adapter. Must be labeled PLANNING DATA.
Volunteer staffing has no backup owner, contact, shift, or training-status fields.
No consent capture UI. safetyConsent{} and donations{} exist in blank() but no step renders them.
rCh2Interview camera brief is a modal fused to founder answers; needs to become a printable export.
Capacity uses Math.min() correctly but Event Day dashboard ignores the result.

tangles_locks_image.alt_text: Exterior of Tangles & Locs Salon and Spa, venue for Community Cuts for Kids.

rollback.method: git revert of squash commit + redeploy main
rollback.preconditions: No destructive DB migration in this build (RSVP adds new table + RPC, no DROP/ALTER of existing)
rollback.data_loss_risk: NONE at baseline. Workbook saves to existing Supabase RPC save_submission/load_submission unchanged.

stop_conditions_observed: Phase 10 (landing page) BLOCKED until Jeremy supplies the landing-page repo URL.
Email/SMS provider credentials not present — Phase 06 will implement signed-email cancellation flow, place SMS behind feature flag, STOP at provider decision gate.
